description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a flat roof and a sprawling, rectangular footprint. The structure features multiple sections, including a main living area, a garage, and several outdoor amenities such as a swimming pool and a tennis court. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of light blue and gray, and there are numerous large windows and glass doors that provide ample natural light. The property is surrounded by low fencing and landscaped greenery, with paved driveways and walkways connecting the different areas. The design emphasizes open spaces and luxury, with outdoor seating areas and a well-maintained garden. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A large, modern white bungalow with flat roofs, expansive windows, a swimming pool, tennis court, and landscaped grounds, exuding luxury and contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, and tennis court prominently in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis court, pool area, and the elongated structure of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, and multiple large windows and doors opening to outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the tennis court, driveway, and the length of the building with visible landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
